name: No Beans Beef Chili with Cornmeal
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4.5 oz) chopped black olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, cook the ground beef, onion, and green pepper until the meat turns brown. Drain excess fat.
2. Transfer the cooked mixture to a Crock-Pot.
3. Stir in enchilada sauce, tomato sauce, olives, chili powder, salt, oregano, and cumin.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
5. In a saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil. Gradually stir in the cornmeal. Reduce heat to low and cook until thick.
6. Drop spoonfuls of cornmeal into the chili.
7. If cooking on Low, increase heat to High. Cover and cook for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Sprinkle cheese over the top and continue cooking until melted.
9. Serves 6 to 8 people.
